title: Momonosuke Meets the Minks
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on momonosuke meets the minks within the Take Me With You storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A family of Assassins?! What is this about?!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: At last the Secret Behind Sanji's Birth is Revealed!!

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Are you aware of the name Germa 66?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: also referred to as warmonger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...that make-believe mythical evil army?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What a load of crap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No... it's an organization that really exists.

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: And at the top of it is the Vinsmoke family.

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: And its boss is black leg's father.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please, believe me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It was not my intent to keep things hidden from you... my friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't have a clue what you're talking about!! And even if I did, I wouldn't care!! It doesn't matter anyway!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GAO!! I suppose so.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All we want to know is if he's coming back or not!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I couldn't care less whether or not he goes and gets married!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But there's no way I'd be okay with us ending up as big mom's underlings!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: When this all goes down, you all become my underlings instead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Geeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Pekoms!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahaha- hah! You're a strange one, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Watch your mouth, boy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I will wreck you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: LIFESAVER OR NOT, DON'T GO GETTING CARRIED AWAY WITH YOUR- SELF!!! MAMA IS AN EMPEROR OF THE SEA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: > she's one of the yonkou!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: "Kay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ooooooooghhh ...you're making my my wounds hurt even more...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ahahahaha, your eyes are so cute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shut up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ugu ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: {pant...* AH well...spant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: {Pant...}

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In any case, he won't be able to run away from this marriage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As you can guess from how black leg already left...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: to start with... there's no way to refuse Mama's tea party invitation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you refuse it, then a few days later... a certain present will be delivered to him.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: For insulting Mama's honor... you can bet there's nothing nice to be found inside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Inside the present will be the head...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: of some- one who has been involved with him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It might be the head of someone from the straw hat pirates... or of someone from the restaurant in East Blue...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: or even someone from the Kamabaka kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How the hell do you guys even know about all that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is what is called Power!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Straw hat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A threat... A demand... when issued by one with absolute, overwhelming power...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Becomes simply inevitable fate ...After all, who could possibly oppose it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That is the existence known as the yonkou!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And this is what it means to be driven to your very wit's end...!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: ...so this is why Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Had no choice but to go...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll say one more thing to ease your worries, my lifesavers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You won't have to become affiliated with or sail under us....!! GAO!!

summary: Momonosuke Meets the Minks: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
